title: Working Class Bonus Tax Relief Act of 2025
short_title: Working Class Bonus Tax Relief Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
crs_summary: Working Class Bonus Tax Relief Act of 2025 This bill allows a tax deduction for bonuses received by an individual, subject to income limitations, through 2029. The amount of the deduction may not exceed 15% of the individual’s regular wages from the same employer. Further, the deduction is not allowed for individuals with annual adjusted gross income exceeding $100,000 (or $150,000 for heads of the household and $200,000 for married couples filing a joint return).
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
